sourceSummary.oneLine: Bill of materials for BLUE_1717 ROIC PBA SMD and 1717_ROIC Ass'y.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Used to identify ROIC assembly electrical parts, quantities, references, process status, part names, supplier part numbers, specifications, supplier abbreviations, and notes.
keyPoints: The sheet identifies the assembly as 1717_ROIC Ass'y and BLUE_1717 ROIC PBA SMD.
The PCB line specifies BLUE_1717 ROIC PCB, FR4, 8Layer, T1.2, 430*39.5.
Most listed parts use the SM process, while several entries are marked SKIP.
Supplier names or abbreviations include Murata, Walsin, KEL, YEONHO, Texas Instruments, Onsemi, Analog Device, Panasonic, Diotec, Diode, AVX, Samsung, and E-Song.

entities.name: Texas Instruments
entities.evidence: IC_CLK_BUF,CDCLVD1212RHAR,"Clock Buffer Low Jitter,2-Inp Sel 1:12 Uni-to-LVDS Bf,VQFN-40",Texas Instruments

entities.name: Analog Device
entities.evidence: IC_REG,ADM7172ACPZ-2.5-R7,"LDO Voltage Regulators 2A Hi PSRR FT LDO 2.5Vo,LFCSP-8",Analog Device

evidence.claim: The BOM identifies BLUE_1717 ROIC PBA SMD.
The PCB specification includes FR4, 8Layer, T1.2, and 430*39.5.
The header states FR4 8L_430mm x 39.5mm x 1.2T(BLUE) Rev.03 applies.
The BOM includes columns for item, quantity, reference, process, part name, supplier part number, specification, supplier abbreviation, note, supplier name, and responsible person.
Item 18 for U25 is marked SKIP.
evidence.evidenceText: 18,1,U25,,,,SKIP,IC_REG,ADP7182ACPZN-R7,"LDO Voltage Regulators 28 V,200 mA, Low Noise,LFCSP-6",Analog Device,SKIP

evidence.claim: Item 8 lists CDCLVD1212RHAR as an IC_CLK_BUF supplied by Texas Instruments.
evidence.evidenceText: 8,1,U2,,,,SM,IC_CLK_BUF,CDCLVD1212RHAR,"Clock Buffer Low Jitter,2-Inp Sel 1:12 Uni-to-LVDS Bf,VQFN-40",Texas Instruments

evidence.claim: Item 42 lists 146 units of CL10B104KB8NNND ceramic chip capacitors supplied by Samsung.
